evidence: DeSo, Steem, NFT Twitter features all failed; Web3 social adoption never materialized
fizzle_reason: User experience too complex; no compelling reason vs. free web2 alternatives

evidence: Decentraland ghost town, Sandbox declining; Meta lost $40B on metaverse
fizzle_reason: No hardware (VR headsets) at scale; no compelling use case beyond speculation

evidence: Axie Infinity collapsed 95%; most P2E games dead; sustainable models not found
fizzle_reason: Ponzi economics; gameplay secondary to token earning; not fun

evidence: Boom Supersonic delayed repeatedly; Aerion went bankrupt; physics/economics don't work
fizzle_reason: Unit economics impossible at consumer price points; regulatory/noise barriers

evidence: Clubhouse 98% decline; Twitter Spaces abandoned; Spotify live audio shutdown
fizzle_reason: Synchronous audio inconvenient; content not discoverable; no retention loop

evidence: Waymo still geo-limited 2025; Tesla FSD not fully autonomous; timeline shifted 15+ years
fizzle_reason: Regulatory, liability, and edge-case engineering harder than anticipated

evidence: SmartThings declining, Wink shutdown, HomeKit limited; fragmentation killed market
fizzle_reason: No interoperability standard; setup too complex for mainstream; Matter arrived late

evidence: Groupon $15B → $200M; LivingSocial dead; flash sale model collapsed
fizzle_reason: Merchant economics terrible; customer retention zero; race to bottom on margins

evidence: Never took off in US despite multiple attempts; NFC (Apple/Google Pay) won instead
fizzle_reason: UX inferior to tap-to-pay; no incentive for merchant or consumer adoption

evidence: Celsius $4.7B collapse, BlockFi bankrupt, Voyager bankrupt
fizzle_reason: Yield was unsustainable leverage/fraud; regulatory action; 2022 crypto winter
